data.title: L3Harris partners with DoW for missile solutions, $1 billion proposed investment to boost rocket motor production.
data.description: In an unprecedented move, L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) revealed plans for a groundbreaking collaboration with the Department of War to enhance production capabilities for solid rocket motors used in critical U.S. and allied missiles. The proposed partnership involves a substantial investment by the Department of War in L3Harris’ Missile Solutions division through a $1 billion convertible preferred security. This investment is structured to convert into common equity upon an initial public offering.

data.title: American Pride Bank expands One-Time Close Construction Programs via APB Wholesale division in ATL, boosting investors' options.
data.description: In Atlanta on January 13, 2026, American Pride Bank (APB) revealed the launch of an enhanced line of One-Time Close Construction Loan offerings via its wholesale mortgage arm, APB Wholesale. This move signifies APB's dedication to offering adaptable financial solutions and marks a significant development in its services.

data.title: Maple Leaf Foods forecasts mid-single digit revenue growth in 2026, with Adjusted EBITDA of $520-540 million and a 10% dividend increase.
data.description: Maple Leaf Foods Inc. announced its 2026 financial guidance, highlighting a mid-single digit increase in revenue from 2025. They expect adjusted EBITDA to be approximately $520-$540 million, aiming to maintain an investment-grade balance sheet. The company plans to invest $160-$180 million in capital, focusing on productivity enhancement and technology. Additionally, Maple Leaf Foods will increase its quarterly dividend by approximately 10%. CEO Curtis Frank expressed confidence in their growth, margin expansion, and ability to generate strong free cash flow. These strategies aim to create sustained growth and value for shareholders.

data.title: First Quantum to announce Q4 & year-end 2025 results on Feb 10 after TSX closure, with conference call on Feb 11 at 9:00 am ET.
data.description: In Toronto on January 13, 2026, First Quantum Minerals Ltd. announced that they will be revealing their financial and operating outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on February 10, 2026, following the closure of the Toronto Stock Exchange. The company, listed as TSX: FM, is set to hold a conference call and webcast elaborating on these results on February 11, 2026, at 9:00 am (ET). Moreover, they will also disclose preliminary production figures for 2025. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Unity Bancorp reported quarterly earnings of $15.5 million and full-year earnings of $58.0 million, showing growth from the previous year. CEO stated that the company achieved a 39.8% increase in net income and continued to expand across loans and deposits.
data.description: Unity Bancorp, Inc., parent company of Unity Bank, reported a net income of $15.5 million, or $1.52 per diluted share, for the quarter ended December 31, 2025, up from $14.4 million in the previous quarter. For the twelve months ended December 31, 2025, they reported a net income of $58.0 million, compared to $41.5 million in the previous year. This represents a 39.8% increase in net income. CEO James A. Hughes noted a record year for the company, with a 2.17% Return on Assets (ROA) and 18.07% Return on Equity (ROE). Gross loans increased by $284 million, deposits grew by $224 million, and customer deposits increased by $168 million. The company emphasized organic growth strategies and expressed optimism moving into 2026.

data.title: London-based SaaS company Diginius becomes a TikTok Channel Sales Partner, gaining a Marketing Technology badge.
data.description: Diginius, a London SaaS company, shared exciting news on Jan. 13, 2026, stating that they have attained a Marketing Technology badge within the TikTok Marketing Partners Program. This prestigious recognition places them in the top tier of marketing technology providers in TikTok's program.

data.title: Boeing secures 50 737 MAX jet order from ACG, boosting ACG's total order to 121, largest for 737-10 model.
data.description: On Tuesday, Boeing Company announced that Aviation Capital Group LLC placed an order for 50 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft. The order includes 25 737-8 and 25 737-10 jets. This purchase brings ACG's total Boeing 737 MAX order book to 121, with 50 firm orders for the 737-10, establishing ACG as the lessor with the largest 737-10 order book. The 737 MAX series offers airlines efficiency and flexibility for short- and medium-haul flights, making it a valuable asset for lessors. This news comes amidst growing interest from lessors in the 737 MAX family, with more developments expected in the near future.

data.title: QTC Metric Gears increases stock metric gear options for industrial automation applications. Available at shop.sdp-si.com.
data.description: In recent news from Hicksville, New York, on January 13, 2026, QTC Metric Gears announced the expansion of its range of stock metric gearing solutions to cater to industrial automation and similar high-demand applications. The updated product offerings can now be accessed through shop.sdp-si.com, providing customers with a wider selection of gears to choose from.
